scripts.lint:boundaries: biome lint packages/shared/src packages/core/src packages/workers packages/cli/src packages/eval/src scripts
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared packages/workers packages/core packages/cli packages/eval packages/desktop
scripts.desktop:check: pnpm desktop:build-sidecar && pnpm desktop:build-web && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --locked -- -D warnings
scripts.verify:rust: pnpm tauri:build-sidecar && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/eval/src/platform/tauri-smoke/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/eval/src/platform/tauri-smoke/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --locked -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/core/native/windows-pipe-guard/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/core/native/windows-pipe-guard/Cargo.toml --locked -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/workers/native/windows-hcs-helper/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/workers/native/windows-hcs-helper/Cargo.toml --locked -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/workers/native/windows-appcontainer-launcher/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/workers/native/windows-appcontainer-launcher/Cargo.toml --locked -- -D warnings && pnpm desktop:check
scripts.verify: pnpm check:source && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm core:windows-pipe-guard:build && pnpm workers:windows-native:build && pnpm test && pnpm test:native && pnpm verify:rust && pnpm workers:macos:build && pnpm workers:windows:build
